description: Contract types file packages/clients/src/lib/commandCenterTypes.ts: ClientPulse, ClientAttentionFlag, ClientTimelineEvent(+Type), ClientTimelinePage, pulse section types (pure types, no runtime imports)
getClientPulse action (packages/clients/src/actions/clientPulseActions.ts): withAuth, base gate client:read, returns RBAC-shaped ClientPulse
Pulse service section: open ticket count, oldest-open age days, overdue count, top 3 open tickets by priority with entered_at (ticket:read gated)
Pulse money section: AR aging buckets current/30/60/90+ = finalized invoices outstanding (total_amount − invoice_payments − credit_applied) bucketed by due_date, in cents with currency code
Pulse money section: draft invoice list (id, number, total, created_at) and active contract count (contracts.owner_client_id, status active)

Pulse installBase section: managed asset count (asset:read), sold unit count (stock_units client_id + delivered), open RMA count, up to 3 recent delivered units with serial + linked asset_id (inventory:read)
Pulse people section: contact count + up to 3 contacts (default contact first) with name/role/email
Pulse locations section: all active locations with name, address, default/billing/shipping flags, phone
Pulse documents section: total count + 3 most recent (name, updated_at, size) via document_associations (document:read gated)
Pulse record section: account manager name, default contact name, inbound email domains, tax region, client since (created_at), is_inactive
Attention flag: draft invoices (count, summed cents, newest invoice ref) — billing:read gated
Attention flag: partially fulfilled open sales orders (per-SO lines fulfilled/total from quantity_ordered vs quantity_fulfilled) — inventory:read gated
Attention flag: overdue open tickets (due_date < now, not closed) with count and oldest ref — ticket:read gated
Attention flag: client-waiting tickets — open tickets whose most recent comment has author_type='client' (days since that comment); emitted only from real client-authored comments
Attention flag: open RMA cases (count, oldest opened_at) — inventory:read gated
listClientTimeline action (packages/clients/src/actions/clientTimelineActions.ts): withAuth, client:read gate, cursor pagination (occurred_at,id) desc, per-source RBAC filtering, optional type filter
Timeline sources: tickets opened/closed (entered_at/closed_at) and ticket materials added (ticket_materials.created_at with product name)
Timeline sources: invoices created + finalized (with number, amount cents)
Timeline sources: stock units delivered (product, serial, linked asset), sales orders created, RMAs opened/closed
Timeline sources: interactions (interaction_date, type, title) and quote activities (activity_type incl. converted_to_sales_order, quotes joined by client_id)
No note events in timeline (notes are a collaborative doc, not discrete events)
Barrel exports: commandCenterTypes + both actions exported from packages/clients (actions index; types importable)
ClientCommandCenter component: bento grid layout, receives pulse payload + tab registry, renders only sections present in payload
Command center header: avatar, client name, active/inactive + client-since meta, actions (Edit Client → details focus, Print, New Ticket → existing QuickAddTicket)

AttentionStrip component: severity-colored flag pills built client-side from structured flags (i18n-ready), each navigating to its ref (invoice → billing focus/deep link, SO → SO detail, ticket → ticket), hidden when no flags
Service card: KPIs (open, oldest, overdue) + top open tickets with priority pills, Open ↗ → tickets focus view
Money card: aging bar chart (CSS bars, real cents, 'recorded payments deducted' subtitle), draft invoice rows linking to invoice deep link, active contracts line, Open ↗ → billing dashboard focus
Install base card: managed/sold/RMA counts + recent delivered units (serial links to unit timeline, asset link when present), Open ↗ → equipment focus

People card (contacts preview → contacts focus), Locations card (reusing location display idioms + Manage → locations dialog), Documents card (recent 3 → documents focus), Client record card (record summary + CSAT from existing surveySummary → details focus)
ClientTimelinePanel: tall card, type-colored markers, structured event rendering with links (ticket/invoice/SO/quote/unit/asset), Load more via cursor, type filter dropdown
FocusViewHost: Drawer (~90vw) hosting any tab registry entry by id, one at a time, with title bar + close; nested-drawer safe (existing InsideDialogContext)
ClientDetails restructure: full-page route renders CommandCenter (tab bar removed); quickView/isInDrawer path keeps existing tab layout unchanged
Deep links: ?tab=X opens matching focus view on load (incl. EE Hudu tab ids); opening/closing focus views updates URL via router.replace; unknown ids ignored
Empty/zero states: every card renders an explicit honest empty state (no placeholder numbers); cards for missing permissions are absent entirely
Automation ids on interactive elements (client-cc-* convention: cards, flags, open buttons, timeline load-more)
i18n: all new UI strings via t() with defaultValue, following ClientDetails conventions
